name: Possible Inetutils Telnetd Remote Code Execution
description: Detects potential exploitation of the Inetutils telnetd service indicative of a remote code execution attempt on an endpoint. It correlates the rule signaling telnetd RCE behavior to flag a likely attack chain targeting the legacy Telnet service. Successful exploitation can grant attackers remote command execution and system control, making early detection critical to prevent compromise and lateral movement.

rules.name: Possible Inetutils Telnetd Remote Code Execution
Telnetd GNU InetUtils Authentication Bypass Vulnerability

author: Letian Cheng
